_comment: Trigger fixtures for eval_triggers.py. Each case is a representative user message and the skill that SHOULD auto-fire (or NONE). 'expect' must equal a skill dir name, or 'NONE'. The first block is one clean case per skill; the second block ('-- disambiguation --') stress-tests skills whose descriptions overlap (cc-tune vs doc-illustrate, explain-article vs cc-tune = 理解 vs 取り込み診断, explain-article vs ざっと要約 = NONE, ship vs create-pr, doc-review over-firing on light reviews). Add cases as you discover real mis-fires from the usage dashboard (P3).
